errors.network: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page or study you are looking for does not exist.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.message: You are doing that too fast. Please wait a moment.

500.title: Server Error
500.message: Our servers encountered an issue. Please try again later.

study_not_found.title: Study Not Found
study_not_found.message: We couldn't find a study with that name. Please check the URL or contact the researcher.

draft.title: Study Under Preparation
draft.message: This study is not available for participation yet. Please check back later.

paused.title: Maintenance in Progress
paused.message: Data collection is temporarily paused for maintenance. We will be back shortly.

closed.title: Data Collection Closed
closed.message: This study is now closed. Participation is no longer possible.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: By sorting these sentences, you help us understand your point of view. It's simple, interactive, and there are no wrong answers!

consent.label: I confirm I am at least 18 years old. I understand my participation is voluntary and revocable, and I consent to the anonymous processing of my data for research purposes.
consent.error: Please accept the terms to continue.

welcome.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to start a new session? This will clear your current progress.
welcome.default_instructions:
1. **Getting to know you:** a few quick questions to better understand your background.
2. **Your first impressions:** discover the statements and give your spontaneous reaction (agree, neutral, or disagree).
3. **Your tailored vision:** refine your perspective by placing each statement on the grid to precisely reflect your thoughts.
4. **The "why":** a few words to explain your most significant choices.

consent.title: Consent to Participate
consent.subtitle: Please review the following information carefully.
consent.default_text:
**Confidentiality and Anonymity:**
Your responses will be treated as strictly confidential, anonymized, and in compliance with GDPR. Results will be aggregated to identify general trends (viewpoint factors) and will never allow for your individual identification.

**Data Usage:**
Collected data will be used exclusively for scientific research purposes.

**Voluntary Participation:**
Your participation is entirely voluntary. You are free to refuse to participate or to stop the study at any time without having to justify your decision.

presort.title: About you
presort.description: Please answer a few questions to help us contextualize your point of view.

header.title: What is your position regarding this statement?
header.subtitle: Swipe **Left** to Disagree, **Right** to Agree, or **Down** for Neutral/Undecided.
header.hint: Trust your **gut**. This is spontaneous — you can change your mind right after.

instructions.desktop_tip: Swipe, tap, or use keyboard ( ← ↓ → ) to sort

header.title: Organize the grid according to your feelings
header.mobile_title: Fill the grid with your feelings

deck.title: Statements available
deck.all_placed: All statements from this stack are placed
deck.confirm_reset: Restart the grid placement? Your statements will return to the deck.

toolbar.mobile: Tap or drag statements to place them on the grid.
toolbar.desktop: Drag or tap statements to place them on the grid.
toolbar.label: Grid controls

workbench.drag_or_tap: Drag to grid or tap a slot

methodology.extremes: Tip: Start with what's most obvious to you (at the extremes).
methodology.vertical: In the same column, the order from top to bottom doesn't matter. Only the column counts.
methodology.constraint: You have to fit everything! It can be a puzzle, but that's how we prioritize choices.

post.title: To conclude
post.description: You're almost done! Your comments on the most significant statements are crucial for our analysis.

extreme.why: Why is this statement particularly significant to your perspective?
extreme.placeholder: E.g., A specific event, a strong belief, or a particular word in the statement...
extreme.min_chars: A few words are enough to help us understand the context.

missing.label: Is there something important about your view that wasn't captured?
missing.description: If you feel an important aspect was left out, please describe it here.

general.label: General comments
general.description: Any feedback on the study or additional thoughts?

post.validation_error: Please briefly explain your key choices to continue.

success.title: Thank you for your participation!
success.message: Your contribution to the study has been saved.
